children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: In this subchapter, the terms “agent of a foreign power”, “Attorney General”, “contents”, “electronic surveillance”, “foreign intelligence information”, “foreign power”, “person”, “United States”, and “United States person” have the meanings given such terms in , except as specifically provided in this subchapter.section 1801 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the Select Committee on Intelligence of the Senate; and

children.label: B
children.text: the Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Court; Court
children.label: 2 Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Court; Court
children.text: The terms “Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Court” and “Court” mean the court established under .section 1803(a) of this title

children.heading: Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Court of Review; Court of Review
children.label: 3 Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Court of Review; Court of Review
children.text: The terms “Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Court of Review” and “Court of Review” mean the court established under .section 1803(b) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: a telecommunications carrier, as that term is defined in ;section 153 of title 47

children.label: B
children.text: a provider of electronic communication service, as that term is defined in ;section 2510 of title 18

children.label: C
children.text: a provider of a remote computing service, as that term is defined in ;section 2711 of title 18

children.label: D
children.text: any other communication service provider who has access to wire or electronic communications either as such communications are transmitted or as such communications are stored;

children.label: i
children.text: a public accommodation facility, as that term is defined in ;section 1861(4) of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: a dwelling, as that term is defined in ;section 3602 of title 42

children.label: iii
children.text: a community facility, as that term is defined in ; orsection 1592n of title 42

children.label: iv
children.text: a food service establishment, as that term is defined in ; orsection 1638 of title 7

children.label: F
children.text: an officer, employee, custodian, or agent of an entity described in subparagraph (A), (B), (C), (D), or (E).

children.heading: Intelligence community
children.label: 5 Intelligence community
children.text: The term “intelligence community” has the meaning given the term in .section 3003(4) of this title
